channel.title: Making on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Making on Tech Tracker

item.title: Telegram started making free features as premium exclusive.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-7mYH3qxilrk/YxOOkgLlmtI/AAAAAAAANgE/DfbKkwNm8U8Nx6CxKGyAp82THGpwauO-QCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1662226060299980-0.png" alt=""> Social media networks are basically digital platforms build using many programming languages accessible through supported electronic devices like PC aka personal computers and smartphones which has options and features to let you send and receive text, video messages to anyone around the world came into existence when inventor Tim Berners Lee in year 1991 released browser software named world wide web to crawl Internet protocol aka IP network of computers.
